name: Red Pill Cola
short_description: Play aim and shoot with a slingshot, knocking down soda cans.
detailed_description:
In this game, you must search for all the soda cans scattered across the scene. Using your slingshot, knock down each one to move on to the next stage before time runs out.

With every new playthrough, the cans are repositioned, keeping the challenge alive. Your score is displayed at the end of the game.

If you used to play with a slingshot as a child, this game might bring back fond memories of those good times.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Greek, Dutch, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Czech, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Arabic
